title: Elastic N.V. (ESTC) Beats Q3 Expectations with Strong Growth in Search AI and Cloud Revenue
text: Elastic beats Q3 expectations driven by Search AI and cloud revenue strength. Q3 FY2024 Earnings Beat: Revenue of $328 million beat expectations. Adjusted earnings per share exceeded consensus estimates. Cloud revenue segment showed particularly strong momentum. Search AI Product Impact: Search AI Lake architecture enabling new use cases. Exabyte-scale capability attracting enterprise customers. Low-latency search with AI relevance driving adoption. Cloud Revenue Acceleration: Elastic Cloud revenue grew 29% year-over-year. Cloud segment now representing growing portion of total revenue. Migration from self-managed to cloud continuing to drive revenue mix shift. Customer Wins: Large deal momentum in security and observability. Competitive wins against legacy SIEM and OpenSearch. Platform consolidation narrative resonating with enterprise customers. Forward Outlook: Management optimistic on continued momentum. AI adoption expected to accelerate growth rates. Cloud-first strategy validating in market. Risk Factors: Macroeconomic uncertainty affecting spending patterns. Competition intensifying in observability and SIEM markets. Public sector spending pressure noted as headwind.
